---
pagetitle: "Ramon Gomes da Silva"
title: "Ramon Gomes da Silva"
subtitle: "Research Professor and Data Scientist"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    about:
      template: trestles
      image: /assets/images/avatar.jpg
      links:
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          href: https://github.com/ramongss
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ramongomesdasilva/
        - text: "{{< ai lattes >}} Lattes"
          href: http://lattes.cnpq.br/5215999364926772
        - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} Orcid"
          href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8580-7695
        - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} ScopusID"
          href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=57216842447
        - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
          href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en-US&user=s00ZdLQAAAAJ
        - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} ResearchGate"
          href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Ramon-Gomes-Da-Silva
---

# `> Hello, World!` 👋

I am **Ramon G. da Silva**, Ph.D. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science 🎓 and currently working as Research Professor at [Industrial and Systems Engineering Graduate Program (PPGEPS) at PUCPR](https://www.pucpr.br/escola-politecnica/industrial-and-systems/).

My research focuses on leveraging machine learning and AI techniques for time series forecasting 📈. I've applied these methods across diverse domains -- including [wind energy production in Brazilian wind farms](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0142061522005051), [COVID-19 cases predictions in Brazil and U.S. (with meteorological data)](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0960077920304252), and [cryptocurrecy (Bitcoin) price trends](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9207152).

I code in both [**R** (#rstats)](https://www.r-project.org/) and [**Python**](https://www.python.org/). and when I’m not working with data, I’m probably playing guitar 🎸 -- you can even find a few rock singles I recorded on [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/5H5Ht9iimWk5MVXMQV3Ta9?si=yriOrXVKScSGYsjDfVdEUw) (check it out). Feel free to connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ramongomesdasilva/) ✉️ or any of my social accounts. And yes, I'm still recovering from the last Star Wars trilogy 😅.

::: {.columns}

::: {.column widht="50%"}

## Interests

- Data science
- Artificial intelligence
- Machine learning
- Time series forecasting
- Signal decomposition
- Ensemble learning

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

## Education

🎓 **PhD in Industrial and Systems Engineering, 2019 - 2023**,
_Pontifical Catholic University of Parana (BR)_

🎓 **MSc in Industrial and Systems Engineering, 2017 - 2019**,
_Pontifical Catholic University of Parana (BR)_

🎓 **BSc in Industrial Engineering, 2011 - 2016**,
_State University of Para (BR) & University of Southern Indiana (USA, Exchange)_

:::

:::
